The '''Pelagia Embassy''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], was located on [[Estalle Island]]. Despite the [[House Mecetti|Mecetti]] sponsored purge of [[House Pelagia]] they retained the possession of their large embassy building on Estalle Island. It had the largest gardens than any of the other [[Tapani Noble Houses|House]] embassies.
